name: Fairgrounds pickleball courts
description: Fairgrounds pickleball courts is a place to play pickleball in Eunice, LA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Harris Park Pickleball Courts
description: Harris Park Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eunice, LA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Landon Pitre Memorial Park
description: Landon Pitre Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Cankton, LA. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Sunset Park
description: Come play pickleball at Sunset Park in Sunset, LA! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
